g.text: training: masked Huber (δ = 15) at sensor pixels only · AdamW (lr 1e-3, wd 1e-3) · 5-epoch warmup → cosine · AMP · 96 px random crops

text.style: font-size: 9.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: modality dropout: each source group zeroed w.p. 0.15 per batch after normalization — flags exempt, so the availability signal survives

text.style: font-size: 9.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: flags group: 1 binary channel per source group, 1 when the source reported that day pre-fill (flag-and-fill)
